summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive candidates are routed to central security handling; unrelated open PRs are kept non-mutating for maintainer review, proof, or normal PR handling.

actions.reason: Standalone maintainer PR with passing relevant evidence but no shared canonical and no allowed merge path.
Focused open PR should remain available for maintainer review as its own item.
Security-boundary authorization work must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog cleanup.
Open Android UI fix has a linked issue path and should stay open for normal maintainer/author follow-up.
Plausible linked fix path, but proof is still missing; keep it related to its issue instead of closing or escalating the whole shard.
Large standalone feature PR needs ordinary maintainer review; no dedupe or close action is justified.
Attachment URL parsing includes security-shaped review findings, so only the affected PR is quarantined.
Open contributor PR has unresolved correctness/review blockers but remains independent work, not a closeout candidate.
Standalone maintainer PR with passing focused evidence should stay in normal maintainer review flow.
Standalone approval-lane fix should remain open for focused maintainer handling; mixed check state blocks any merge-style recommendation.
